businessSummary.oneLiner: Southeast Asia's largest e-commerce (Shopee), digital entertainment (Garena/Free Fire), and fintech (Monee) operator — Singapore-based global internet company
businessSummary.description: Sea Limited is a Singapore-based global tech company. Reported Q4 2025 on 3/3: revenue $6.85B (+38.4% YoY), EPS $0.63. Revenue beat but EPS missed consensus by $0.28, causing a sharp selloff. Closed at $88.26 (+0.50%) on 3/4 with a mild bounce. FY2025 revenue $22.94B (+36.4%), net income $1.58B (+255%). Monee loan balance $9.2B (+80%), 90-day NPL 1.1%. BofA lowered target from $200 to $182. P/E 35.02x, Forward P/E 20.79x, PEG 0.35.
howTheyMakeMoney: E-commerce (Shopee): #1 SE Asia e-commerce platform. GMV-based fees and advertising. Q4 revenue +35.8%
Digital Financial Services (Monee/SeaMoney): Digital payments, lending, insurance. Q4 revenue +54.3%, loan balance $9.2B (+80%)
Digital Entertainment (Garena): Free Fire and other game operations. Q4 bookings +23.8% YoY
Other: Logistics (Shopee Express), food delivery, etc.
keyProducts: Shopee: #1 e-commerce platform in SE Asia and Latin America
Free Fire: Globally popular battle royale mobile game
SeaMoney/Monee: Digital payments and financial services, $9.2B loan balance

keyMetrics.interpretation: Reasonable after selloff. Undervalued vs growth peers

keyMetrics.interpretation: Well below 1.0, signaling significant undervaluation vs growth

keyMetrics.interpretation: Improving but VIP program investment pressuring margins

keyMetrics.interpretation: Strong cash generation with ample reinvestment capacity

growthDrivers.title: Q4 2025 revenue $6.85B (+38.4%) beat — but EPS missed
growthDrivers.description: Revenue beat consensus by $420M but EPS $0.63 missed by $0.28. VIP program investment and Monee provision increase impacted.

growthDrivers.title: Monee AI-powered lending acceleration — loan balance $9.2B (+80%)
growthDrivers.description: AI underwriting expanding lending base. 37M active credit users, 5.8M new borrowers in Q4. NPL 1.1% healthy.

growthDrivers.title: FY2025 net income +255% turnaround
growthDrivers.description: Annual net income $1.58B, 3.5x increase YoY. Structural profitability improvement confirmed.

growthDrivers.title: Upgraded to Strong Buy — YE26 target $136
growthDrivers.description: StockAnalysis: Upgraded to Strong Buy post-selloff as undervalued. +54% upside from current price.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: #1 SE Asia e-commerce (Shopee), benefiting from 670M population digitization. E-commerce-fintech-gaming ecosystem synergy is the core moat.

moats.description: Shopee's two-sided seller-buyer network. More sellers → more buyers.
#1 e-commerce in 6 SE Asian countries. Proprietary logistics (Shopee Express).

competitors.name: TikTok Shop/Lazada
competitors.detail: Rapidly growing SE Asian social commerce. Shopee's biggest threat

competitors.name: MercadoLibre (MELI)
competitors.detail: #1 LatAm e-commerce. Direct competition with Shopee in Brazil

competitors.name: Grab (GRAB)
competitors.detail: SE Asian super-app. Competing in fintech and delivery

competitors.name: Alibaba/Lazada
competitors.detail: Alibaba's capital accelerating SE Asian expansion

analystOpinions.notableComment: Average target $189.17 from 30 analysts implies +114% upside. BofA $182, Strong Buy at $136. Post-selloff re-rating underway.

risks.title: Post-EPS miss selling pressure
risks.description: Q4 EPS $0.63 missed consensus by $0.28. Near-term selling pressure may persist.

risks.title: Monee credit risk
risks.description: Loan balance $9.2B (+80%) rapid growth with provisions up +66.7%. Downturn could increase defaults.

risks.title: SE Asian e-commerce competition intensifying
risks.description: TikTok Shop aggressive expansion and Lazada/Alibaba capital. Margin pressure.

risks.title: RSI 27.3 — extended oversold
risks.description: Technical bounce possible but further decline also open.

risks.title: Share dilution
risks.description: YoY +5.54% share count increase from SBC.

buyReasons.title: PEG 0.35 — extreme undervaluation
buyReasons.rationale: 38%+ growth at P/E 35x. Among the most undervalued growth stocks currently.

buyReasons.title: Analyst target $189 — +114% upside from current
buyReasons.rationale: 25 of 30 analysts rate Buy. Selloff viewed as overdone by market consensus.

buyReasons.title: FY2025 net income +255% turnaround
buyReasons.rationale: Structural profitability improvement confirmed. Q4 miss may be temporary.

buyReasons.title: Monee fintech explosive growth
buyReasons.rationale: Loan balance +80%, 37M active users. SE Asian digital finance leader.

overallOpinion: Sea Limited delivered Q4 revenue of $6.85B (+38.4%) showing strong growth, but the EPS miss triggered a selloff to near 52-week lows.
PEG 0.35 makes this one of the most undervalued growth stocks in the market. 30 analysts average target $189 implies +114% upside.
RSI 27.3 signals oversold territory. Technical bounce likely, but near-term selling pressure may continue.
Monee credit quality (NPL 1.1%) and Shopee competitive position are the key monitoring points. Could be a buying opportunity for long-term investors.
